docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF WHO WOULD HAVE BEEN ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY WEI, GUANG AS TO DEFENDANT TURO INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
